title: Fast Leaf Decay
description:
Spigot plugin (supports foilia) and fabric mod that makes leaves decay instantly. 
That's that.
body:
# Fast Leaf Decay
![gif showcasing the plugin in action](https://github.com/LukeOnuke/fast-leaf-decay/blob/master/demo.gif?raw=true)

Spigot plugin and fabric mod that makes leaves decay instantly. 
That's that.

Faster and less resource intensive than the more popular datapcks that do the same purpose. Developed and tested for the beocraft server.
